goal: Call the EKS module from dev and prod root modules, pass VPC outputs, and validate both environments
summary: Phase 2 completed: dev and prod root modules now call the EKS module, pass VPC outputs, declare EKS variables, provide environment-specific tfvars, and both environments pass terraform fmt and terraform validate.
stepSummaries:
1. Update terraform/environments/dev/main.tf to call module "eks" and pass VPC outputs [verified]
  2. Update terraform/environments/dev/variables.tf to declare EKS input variables [verified]
  3. Update terraform/environments/dev/terraform.tfvars with dev EKS values (cluster_version=1.29, node_instance_types=["t4g.small"], min=2, max=4, desired=2) [verified]
  4. Update terraform/environments/prod/main.tf to call module "eks" and pass VPC outputs [verified]
  5. Update terraform/environments/prod/variables.tf to declare EKS input variables [verified]
  6. Update terraform/environments/prod/terraform.tfvars with prod EKS values [verified]
  7. Run terraform fmt -recursive -check terraform/ [verified]
  8. Run terraform validate in dev [verified]
  9. Run terraform validate in prod [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: All 9 steps verified with real commands: grep, terraform fmt, terraform validate.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Steps 1-6 used grep and terraform fmt -check; Steps 7-9 used terraform fmt -recursive -check and terraform validate in dev/prod.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal met: both environment root modules call module.eks, pass VPC outputs, and validations pass.
gateVerdicts.evidence: terraform/environments/dev/main.tf and prod/main.tf contain module 'eks'; terraform fmt and validate both pass.
